text: Blender version pinning: Should the Dockerfile ARG be fixed to 5.1.2 (reproducible builds) or use a pattern like 5.1 that resolves to latest patch (auto-updates on rebuild, risk of breakage)?
Addon enable method: Use blender --addons blendermcp (requires Blender 3.0+, cleaner) or blender --python-expr "bpy.ops.preferences.addon_enable(module='blendermcp')" (more explicit)?
Port publishing: Current services use 127.0.0.1:PORT:PORT. Should Blender MCP follow 127.0.0.1:9877:9877 (host-only, matches existing) or 0.0.0.0:9877:9877 (exposed to LAN)?
Verification method: Run verification inside container (direct access to blender-mcp stdio via supergateway) or from host via curl to localhost:9877/mcp (validates Docker port publishing)?
SHA256 handling: Compute at build time (download hash verify extract, no hardcoded hash but downloads twice) or accept a known-good value (faster but manual update per version)?
